title: Lock the exact integration policy contract and completion-versus-integration semantics
summary: Turn the target-integration parts of the shared-refs doc into a precise implementation contract: which policy lives on plans, which lifecycle lives on tasks, what counts as published versus completed versus integrated, and which downstream scheduling thresholds should depend on which state.

acceptance.label: Plan-level integration policy, task-level integration lifecycle, and completion-versus-integration semantics are unambiguous enough to implement directly.
The final contract resolves how strict require, shared coordination publication, branch publication, and target landing interact.
